# trinogateway Provider

Trino Gateway provider to interact with the Trino Gateway API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "trinogateway" {
  endpoint = "http://localhost:8080"
  username = "admin"
  password = "admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Endpoint of the Trino gateway
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password to access Trino gateway
- `username` (String) Username to access Trino gateway
